summary: The diff implements a frontend split into Patient App and Staff App with a shared app selector landing page. Most requirements are addressed: PatientApp.tsx, StaffApp.tsx, PatientLoginScreen, StaffLoginScreen, AppSelectorPage, PatientAppLayout, StaffAppLayout, and updated App.tsx routing are all present. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps or issues worth noting.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-22 AC: Successful patient login redirects to /patient/home (URL path).
missing_requirements.reason: PatientApp.tsx sets internal route state to 'home' but the browser URL remains /patient-app — it does not navigate to /patient/home as specified in the AC.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-23 AC: Phlebotomist login redirects to /phlebotomist/tasks, Lab Admin to /admin/bookings, Super Admin to /admin/audit-logs (URL paths).
missing_requirements.reason: StaffApp.tsx uses internal state routing but does not change the browser URL to /phlebotomist/tasks, /admin/bookings, or /admin/audit-logs as specified in the acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-21 AC: The Patient App loads and renders only patient-facing routes at URL paths (/, /patient/*, /profile); the Staff App at (/, /phlebotomist/*, /admin/*, /profile).
missing_requirements.reason: Neither PatientApp nor StaffApp uses URL-based routing for individual pages. All patient pages live under /patient-app and all staff pages under /staff-app with internal state, so /patient/* and /phlebotomist/* URL paths do not exist and are not routable.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-23 AC: Unauthenticated users are redirected to the staff login screen when accessing any staff route (/phlebotomist/*, /admin/*).
missing_requirements.reason: No routes for /phlebotomist/* or /admin/* are defined in App.tsx, so unauthenticated access to those paths cannot trigger a redirect to the staff login screen.

missing_requirements.requirement: Already-authenticated users bypass the landing page and are redirected directly to their role's home screen.
missing_requirements.reason: AppSelectorPage.tsx shows no authentication state check or automatic redirect logic for already-authenticated users in the visible diff content.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal was modified to accept a 'defaultRole' prop and conditionally renders a role selector dropdown for staff users during profile setup.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention modifying ProfileSetupModal or adding role selection during profile setup. This is additional functionality not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: New PatientAppLayout and StaffAppLayout components were created as separate dedicated layout components with their own headers and bottom navigation bars.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraints explicitly state shared components like AppLayout and BottomNavigation must remain shared and not be duplicated. Creating entirely new parallel layout components per app potentially violates this constraint.
